claims.claim: Consuming vegetables at each meal prevents chronic disease and maximises health
claims.mechanism: Provides unique mixture of vegetable fibres, vitamins, oligo-elements and phytochemicals which after gut microbe processing release metabolites that protect from common diseases

consumption.reasoning: Historical recommendation from Sun Simiao (Tang dynasty) supported by modern evidence on fibre-rich foods and gut microbiome metabolites

relationships.description: Part of the recommended fibre-rich food group alongside beans, whole grains, nuts, seeds and fruit

claims.claim: Regular consumption helps prevent accumulation of belly fat and chronic disease
claims.mechanism: Fibre-rich food that after gut microbe processing releases protective metabolites; low in empty calories compared to processed foods

consumption.reasoning: Listed as one of the key fibre-rich foods recommended for longevity

relationships.description: Part of the core fibre-rich food group

claims.claim: Regular consumption prevents chronic disease and supports longevity
claims.mechanism: Rich in vegetable fibre that feeds gut microbes to produce protective metabolites; provides vitamins, oligo-elements and phytochemicals

consumption.reasoning: Listed as key fibre-rich food alongside vegetables, beans, nuts, seeds and fruit

claims.claim: Regular consumption supports disease prevention and longevity
claims.mechanism: Part of fibre-rich food group providing vitamins, oligo-elements and phytochemicals processed by gut microbiome into protective metabolites

claims.claim: Regular consumption supports disease prevention and longevity
claims.mechanism: Part of fibre-rich food group providing vitamins, oligo-elements and phytochemicals processed by gut microbiome into protective metabolites

claims.claim: Regular consumption supports disease prevention and longevity
claims.mechanism: Part of fibre-rich food group providing vitamins, oligo-elements and phytochemicals processed by gut microbiome into protective metabolites

claims.claim: High intake promotes belly fat accumulation, accelerated ageing and chronic disease
claims.mechanism: Rich in sulphur amino acids and branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) which activate pro-ageing pathways; high in empty calories and fat contributing to visceral fat accumulation and inflammatory cytokine/adipokine production
claims.study_ref: Ref 4 in book; Ref 8 in book (adipokines/cytokines from fat cells)

consumption.reasoning: Both ancient (Sun Simiao) and modern evidence indicate limiting meat, fatty foods and refined flours

relationships.description: Should be replaced by vegetables and other fibre-rich plant foods to reduce disease risk

claims.claim: High intake promotes obesity, type 2 diabetes, cardiovascular disease, stroke, cancer, and potentially dementia
claims.mechanism: High in empty calories and low in nutrients; calorie surplus leads to engorged fat cells that produce inflammatory cytokines and adipokines

consumption.reasoning: Primary driver of obesity epidemic and related chronic diseases

relationships.description: Should be substituted with minimally processed fibre-rich whole foods
